summary: Increased category parallel concurrency limits for 96GB machine and added fallback chains for delegation variety. Updated CATEGORY_BASE_CAPS (deep=30, ultrabrain=25, default=15, quick=10), added missing categories (visual-engineering, artistry, writing, unspecified-low), added 2 fallback models per category, modernized MODEL_CAPABILITIES registry with current models (no Anthropic), added normalizeModelId helper.
